title: Orbital Debris Cleanup Mission Portfolio
strategies: trivial: fly the single midpoint profile budget-many times -> one 4D cost point, dominates baseline volume only -> ~0.1
greedy: uniform grid over the three trade-off (position) variables, distance vars at 0.5 (all on the cost frontier) -> spreads but grid is uneven on the curved 3D frontier -> ~0.3-0.4

strong: grid seed + coordinate-wise local 4D hypervolume ascent (multi-scale steps, keep only volume-increasing moves) -> reference-tuned spread, materially more 4D volume, still short of the global optimum -> ~0.5-0.8
